meta.name: Signage Safe Price Tool
meta.description: Industrial-grade calculation tool for determining safe pricing of signage projects based on material, labor, overhead, risk, and quality standards.

inputs.label: Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct cost of raw materials per signage unit, including substrate, ink, and laminates.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct cost of raw materials per signage unit, including substrate, ink, and laminates.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tabela birimi başına doğrudan hammadde maliyeti (alt tabaka, mürekkep ve laminat dahil).
businessContext_i18n.de: Direkte Kosten für Rohmaterial pro Beschilderungseinheit, einschließlich Substrat, Tinte und Laminate.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût direct des matières premières par unité de signalétique, incluant substrat, encre et laminés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo directo de materias primas por unidad de letrero, incluyendo sustrato, tinta y laminados.

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Standard direct labor hours required to produce one signage unit, based on time studies.

label_i18n.es: Horas de mano de obra por unidad

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard direct labor hours required to produce one signage unit, based on time studies.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zaman etütlerine dayalı olarak bir tabela birimi üretmek için gereken standart doğrudan işçilik saati.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standarddirekte Arbeitsstunden zur Herstellung einer Beschilderungseinheit, basierend auf Zeitstudien.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heures de main-d'œuvre directe standard nécessaires pour produire une unité de signalétique, basées sur des études de temps.
businessContext_i18n.es: Horas estándar de mano de obra directa requeridas para producir una unidad de letrero, basadas en estudios de tiempos.

inputs.label: Labor Rate per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Fully burdened hourly wage including benefits, taxes, and overhead allocation.

label_i18n.es: Tarifa de mano de obra por hora

businessContext_i18n.en: Fully burdened hourly wage including benefits, taxes, and overhead allocation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yan haklar, vergiler ve genel gider dağıtımı dahil tam yüklü saatlik ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Voll belasteter Stundenlohn einschließlich Zusatzleistungen, Steuern und Gemeinkostenzuschlag.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux horaire entièrement chargé incluant salaire, avantages, impôts et allocation des frais généraux.
businessContext_i18n.es: Salario por hora totalmente cargado, incluyendo beneficios, impuestos y asignación de gastos generales.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage applied to direct costs to cover facility, equipment, and administrative overhead.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage applied to direct costs to cover facility, equipment, and administrative overhead.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tesis, ekipman ve idari genel giderleri karşılamak için doğrudan maliyetlere uygulanan yüzde.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz, der auf direkte Kosten angewendet wird, um Betriebs-, Ausrüstungs- und Verwaltungsgemeinkosten zu decken.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage appliqué aux coûts directs pour couvrir les frais d'installation, d'équipement et administratifs.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje aplicado a los costos directos para cubrir instalaciones, equipos y gastos administrativos generales.

inputs.label: Complexity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Adjusts labor and waste factors based on design complexity per ISO 9001 process variation guidelines.

businessContext_i18n.en: Adjusts labor and waste factors based on design complexity per ISO 9001 process variation guidelines.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 9001 proses varyasyon kılavuzlarına göre tasarım karmaşıklığına bağlı olarak işçilik ve fire faktörlerini ayarlar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Passt Arbeits- und Abfallfaktoren basierend auf der Designkomplexität gemäß ISO 9001 Prozessvariationsrichtlinien an.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ajuste les facteurs de main-d'œuvre et de rebut en fonction de la complexité de conception selon les directives de variation de processus ISO 9001.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ajusta los factores de mano de obra y desperdicio según la complejidad del diseño, siguiendo las pautas de variación de procesos ISO 9001.

inputs.label: Quality Level
inputs.businessContext: Defines inspection rigor and rework allowance based on Six Sigma quality levels.

businessContext_i18n.en: Defines inspection rigor and rework allowance based on Six Sigma quality levels.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Altı Sigma kalite seviyelerine göre muayene titizliğini ve yeniden işleme payını tanımlar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Definiert Prüfschärfe und Nacharbeitszuschlag basierend auf Six Sigma Qualitätsniveaus.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Définit la rigueur d'inspection et la tolérance de reprise en fonction des niveaux de qualité Six Sigma.
businessContext_i18n.es: Define el rigor de inspección y la tolerancia de retrabajo según los niveles de calidad Seis Sigma.

inputs.label: Order Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Total number of signage units in the order, affecting volume discounts and setup amortization.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of signage units in the order, affecting volume discounts and setup amortization.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Siparişteki toplam tabela birimi sayısı, hacim indirimlerini ve kurulum amortismanını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Beschilderungseinheiten in der Bestellung, beeinflusst Mengenrabatte und Rüstamortisation.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'unités de signalisation dans la commande, affectant les remises sur volume et l'amortissement de la configuration.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de unidades de letrero en el pedido, afectando descuentos por volumen y amortización de preparación.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Expected material waste percentage due to setup, trimming, and defects, aligned with Lean manufacturing targets.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected material waste percentage due to setup, trimming, and defects, aligned with Lean manufacturing targets.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kurulum, düzeltme ve kusurlar nedeniyle beklenen malzeme fire yüzdesi, Yalın üretim hedefleriyle uyumludur.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter Materialabfallprozentsatz aufgrund von Rüstung, Beschnitt und Fehlern, abgestimmt auf Lean-Produktionsziele.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de déchets de matière attendu dû à la configuration, au rognage et aux défauts, aligné sur les objectifs de production Lean.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje esperado de desperdicio de material debido a preparación, recorte y defectos, alineado con objetivos de manufactura Lean.

rules.message: For high complexity, labor hours should be at least 3 hours per unit. Consider updating labor estimate.
Premium quality level expects waste factor ≤ 3%. Reduce waste to meet Six Sigma standards.
Large orders (≥500 units) typically allow risk margin ≤ 8%. Consider reducing risk margin.

thresholds.message: Total cost per unit exceeds $200. Review material and labor inputs for potential savings.
Safe price is less than 15% above cost. Profit margin may be insufficient.
Waste factor exceeds 10%. Investigate process inefficiencies per Lean principles.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
